Soft glow, vintage charm, and just the right touch of magic 💖

This Westmoreland Pink Satin Glass Fairy Lamp is the kind of piece that instantly transforms a space, whether it’s casting a warm evening glow on your nightstand or sitting pretty on a curated shelf. The delicate satin finish paired with that dreamy blush tone? Absolutely timeless.

🌸💖 This isn’t just décor… it’s the little moments of nostalgia you can actually hold.

🍀 For those lucky enough to find it 🍀
🛍️ Available now at hiraethhaven.com

✨ Like something pulled from a glowing sunset… ✨

This Fratelli Toso Orange Aventurine “Starry Night” bowl isn’t just glass, it’s movement, warmth, and light captured in form. Those swirling golden inclusions? That’s aventurine… shimmering like a sky full of embers.

Each curve feels intentional. Each sparkle feels rare.
The kind of piece that doesn’t just sit in a space, it becomes it.

🍂 A statement.
🌙 A conversation.
✨ A little bit of magic.

And like all true treasures… there’s only one.

🍀 For those lucky enough to find it 🍀
🛍️ Shop now at hiraethhaven.com

Duck, duck… GOOSE 🪿✨

These vintage Avon geese measuring spoons just waddled their way into the shop and we are OBSESSED. From their sweet little faces to that classic retro packaging, they’re giving full cozy kitchen nostalgia.

Perfect for display, gifting, or actually measuring out your next masterpiece (because yes, they’re functional AND adorable).
